title: Management database long-term archiving to a recovery manager
abstract: A storage manager for an information management system determines whether one or more predetermined conditions have been met for transferring metadata of previously performed backup jobs stored in a first management database. A backup job may correspond to a backup operation of a primary storage device of a first client computing device. In response to a determination that one or more of the predetermined conditions have been met, the storage manager may transfer metadata for a second plurality of backup jobs to a second management database of a recovery manager. The recovery manager may receive a request to restore data to the primary storage device of the first client computing device based on the metadata of the second plurality of backup jobs. A media agent managed by the recovery manager may then restore the requested data to the primary storage device of the first client computing device.
claims: 10. A computer-implemented method comprising: based on a criterion that has been satisfied, transferring, by a storage manager to a recovery manager, first metadata that is stored at the storage manager, wherein the first metadata was generated by one or more first backup jobs that were previously managed by the storage manager, wherein the one or more first backup jobs generated first backup copies that are stored in secondary storage; wherein the recovery manager is configured to manage restore jobs of the first backup copies from the secondary storage, wherein the storage manager executes on a first computing device that comprises one or more hardware processors, and wherein the recovery manager executes on a second computing device, which is distinct from the first computing device, and which comprises one or more hardware processors; by the recovery manager, storing the first metadata at the recovery manager; by the storage manager, removing the first metadata from the storage manager after transferring the first metadata to the recovery manager; after having removed the first metadata, receiving, by the storage manager, a request to restore at least one of the first backup copies; based on determining that the first metadata has been transferred to the recovery manager, redirecting the request to the recovery manager; and responsive to the request, managing, by the recovery manager, a restore job that restores the at least one of the first backup copies to a primary storage device, wherein the recovery manager is further configured to lack access to data stored at the primary storage device as a data source for backup jobs.
